The logical deduction instantly turned into a sci-fi sketch: in a single-room office on the 2nd floor of a software park, a boss who hasn't even hired a cleaner, holding over 600,000, claims to have simultaneously built a hoverboard assembly line and a robot assembly workshop, and is developing AI algorithms?
